brand.name: pugtools
brand.tagline: Minecraft tools for builders, creators, and players.
brand.description: Fast Minecraft utilities and practical guides to help you build, plan, optimize, and create without bouncing between unrelated sites.
brand.shortPitch: One place for practical Minecraft tools.

categories.name: Building tools
categories.description: Shape planners and layout helpers for circles, curves, arches, and cleaner builds.

categories.name: Optimization tools
categories.description: Planning utilities that cut guesswork, cost, and repeated trial and error.

categories.name: Guides and reference
categories.description: Fast lookup pages and practical references to keep nearby while you play.

categories.name: Creator tools
categories.description: Utilities that help with exports, showcases, packs, and explainer-friendly workflows.

tools.name: Circle Generator
tools.description: Plan block-perfect circles with diameter controls, quadrant views, and quick PNG export.

tools.name: Curve Generator
tools.description: Lay out arches and custom curves with editable handles, coordinate copy, and fast preview export.

tools.name: Enchant Optimizer
tools.description: Find lower-cost anvil merge orders for stacked enchant plans without spreadsheet cleanup.

tools.name: Mob Dub
tools.description: Browse mob sound sets, swap in your own takes, and export a resource pack without the manual cleanup.

tools.name: Conversion Studio
tools.description: Convert audio and image files between formats in the browser — no uploads, no installs.

tools.name: Palette Builder
tools.description: Build 8-block Minecraft color palettes using color theory — pick a seed color, choose a harmony mode, and generate matched block combinations.

tools.name: Potions Plus
tools.description: Browse brewing chains, search potion outcomes, and move through recipes without tab chaos.
